creator: daved@tamu.edu
text:
Module issues the following warnings everytime it is loaded:

	  /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/i386-freebsd7/pcap.so: warning: do not use Fixnums as Symbols
	  /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/i386-freebsd7/pcap.so: warning: do not use Fixnums as Symbols
	  /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/i386-freebsd7/pcap.so: warning: do not use Fixnums as Symbols

How-To-Repeat: 
	Load module in ruby script.

	  require 'pcaplet'
